loomTypes.tapestry_loom: Tapestry Loom — project tracking not currently supported
loomTypes.rug_loom: Rug Loom — project tracking not currently supported
loomTypes.frame_loom: Frame Loom — project tracking not currently supported

appearance.trackerDefaultsHelp: Default view options when opening the activity tracker. You can still override these per-project in the tracker settings panel.
appearance.hideUnusedHelp: When enabled, shafts and treadles not used by the design are hidden in the drawdown viewer. New projects inherit this setting. Default is off (all shafts/treadles shown).
appearance.styleVariantNote: Style variants will be visually differentiated in a future update.

default.label: Default
default.desc: Standard layout with full-size pick cards and drawdown preview.

compact.label: Compact
compact.desc: Denser layout for tracking-heavy sessions with less vertical space.

high_contrast.label: High contrast
high_contrast.desc: Higher visual contrast for easier reading under bright light or for accessibility.

diagnostics.showVersionNumbersHelp: Show or hide the UI, API, and worker version badge in the bottom-right corner.

privacy.optOutHelp: Per our Terms of Service, your data is used for platform improvements by default. Toggle on to opt out.
privacy.dataUseNote: Your content, settings, and tags — including WIF files, photos, and project data — may be used for AI/ML model training and feature improvements as described in the Terms of Service.
privacy.sharingNote: Opting out also disables all public sharing links for your drafts.
privacy.storeEmail: Email address and display name (from your sign-in provider)
privacy.storeFiles: WIF files, loom records, projects, photos, and yarn you create
privacy.storeSettings: Settings, tags, and metadata you assign to your content
privacy.noSell: We never sell your data. See our Terms of Service for the full policy.

optOutModal.title: Opt out of data use?
optOutModal.body: Opting out stops future use of your data for AI/ML model training and feature improvements. Data already used in model training cannot be retroactively removed.
optOutModal.warningTitle: The following will be disabled immediately:
optOutModal.sharingLinks: Public sharing links for all your drafts
optOutModal.futureSharing: Any future sharing features tied to your account
optOutModal.loseAccess: Anyone with your current sharing links will immediately lose access.
optOutModal.reOptInNote: You can opt back in at any time from this page. Re-opting in restores sharing access but does not re-enable individual draft links — you will need to re-share those manually.

terms.accepted: You have accepted the current version.
terms.notAccepted: You have not yet accepted the current version.

feedbackHistory.description: Submissions you've sent, including anonymous ones. Only you can see this list.

account.exportNote: Data export is planned for Milestone 2. Currently returns status only.
account.dangerDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data: WIF files, photos, project records, looms, yarn, and drafts. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteConfirmInstruction: Type DELETE MY ACCOUNT to confirm:

landing.heroBody: Upload your WIF draft, follow along pick by pick, and keep a complete record of every draft from first warp to last pick.
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need at the loom

trackWeaves.title: Track your weaves
trackWeaves.body: Upload your WIF draft and step through every pick. weftmark keeps your place so you can put down the shuttle and pick it right back up.

recordPicks.title: Record every pick
recordPicks.body: Advance, reverse, or jump to any row. Mark a project complete when the last pick is woven in.

manageTools.title: Manage your tools
manageTools.body: Keep a record of your looms and yarn. Assign a loom to a draft and track what's on the beam.
